article_id.description: Stable article, paper, or document identifier.

component_name.description: Name, label, or mention of the biological component.

component_type.description: Task ontology component type such as promoter, RBS, terminator, gRNA, plasmid element, primer, barcode, adapter, or other biological part.

sequence.description: Sequence associated with the component when directly evidenced.

sequence_type.description: DNA, RNA, protein, amino acid, degenerate nucleotide sequence, or unspecified.

host_or_organism.description: Host, organism, strain, chassis, or source organism linked to the component.

function_or_role.description: Reported biological function, regulatory role, or experimental role.

experimental_context.description: Assay, construct, condition, or experimental setting for the component.

evidence_text.description: Exact or normalized evidence text supporting the record.

evidence_source.description: Traceable provenance such as section, table, row, column, supplementary file, or text span.

status.description: Record-level review status used by the task report and final JSONL outputs.

notes.description: Reviewer notes, unresolved ambiguity, or validation warnings.
